notes: Big correctness release from a full code audit. Fixed: multiple-choice questions that teach accents/capitalization now actually require the right form (no more "s" accepted for "š"); resuming a lesson can no longer jump you backwards or skip a due review step; a lesson in progress survives the app being killed; the Today dashboard follows your plan again after browsing old days; French answers typed with a space before ? are graded correctly; exam fill-ins are strictly graded as promised; your streak survives timezone changes; the AI tutor conversation survives switching tabs, and truncated AI replies are detected instead of shown as complete. IMPORTANT: this update also restores the AI tutor (security rotation disabled it on older versions) — update to get it back.
